summary: Frontend-only validation of the new floating Quick Actions bar on /admin/supplier-products. All 12 acceptance criteria verified via Playwright + visual inspection. Bar hides when no selection, renders fixed bottom-center with z-40 when 50+ products selected via Default chip, all 5 action buttons + counter + X close work and open the correct downstream modals (Bulk Sale & Labels, Bulk Category Editor, Bulk Edit Products) or trigger native window.confirm (Archive). Mark Not For Sale fires its async unpublish flow without crashing. No new console errors introduced by the QA bar.
critical_code_review_comments: SupplierProducts.js is now 16,026 lines — far over the 700-line guideline. Should be split into composable subcomponents (QuickActionsBar, BulkModals, SmartSelect, etc.) for maintainability. Not a blocker for this feature, but should be flagged for tech-debt sprint.

Pre-existing dashboard issues (NOT introduced by this feature): GET historical-entries returns 500, and AdminDashboard renders lists without unique key prop (React warning). Worth fixing but unrelated to Quick Actions bar.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing Default tier (50 products) via Smart Select 'Default' chip
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified Quick Actions bar on /admin/supplier-products: (1) bar absent at 0 selection; (2) appears with selectedProducts>0 at fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-40, computed style position=fixed zIndex=40 bottom=24px transform=translateX(-50%); (3) counter renders '50 products selected' (plural via `size === 1 ? '' : 's'` ternary, code-verified — could not trigger size=1 in test because clicking individual row checkbox in the grouped table often toggles whole series, this is table behavior not bar bug); (4) qa-apply-sale opens 'Bulk Sale & Labels (50 products)' Dialog with role=dialog; (5) qa-description opens 'Bulk Category Editor' modal; (6) qa-change-supplier opens 'Bulk Edit Products / 50 products selected' modal (note: this Dialog uses a custom wrapper without explicit role='dialog' attribute — visually confirmed via screenshot); (7) qa-archive fires window.confirm with text 'Are you sure you want to archive 50 product(s)? They will be set to inactive.' — dismissed; (8) qa-unpublish fires unpublishSelectedFromWebsite without throwing (no native confirm in this flow); (9) qa-deselect-all (X) clears selection and bar is removed from DOM. z-40 sits below dialog z-50 so modals correctly render on top. Pre-existing dashboard 500 on /historical-entries and React key prop warnings are unrelated.
